Generating test suite based on SPEC acceptance criteria...

```python
import pytest
from synapse_os.persistence import RunRepository, ArtifactStore


def test_run_repository_persists_run_after_creation(tmp_path):
    db_path = tmp_path / "runs.db"
    repo = RunRepository(db_path=db_path)
    run_id = repo.create_run(request="test request")
    assert run_id is not None
    run = repo.get_run(run_id)
    assert run is not None
    assert run.status == "pending"


def test_artifact_store_saves_raw_output_by_step(tmp_path):
    store = ArtifactStore(artifacts_dir=tmp_path)
    store.save_raw("run-001", "PLAN", "raw output content")
    saved = store.load_raw("run-001", "PLAN")
    assert saved == "raw output content"
```

Tests cover: run creation, artifact persistence, and status transitions.
